name: Senior Royco USDC
redeem: srRoyUSDC is an ERC-4626 vault share for USDC deposited into Royco Dawn senior tranches. Deposits require KYC/KYB and U.S. persons are not eligible. Vault withdrawals use 30-day epochs, then up to 2 days of processing before funds are claimable; a secondary market may offer faster exit if liquidity exists.
notes: Senior vault allocates across multiple senior tranches with junior first-loss protection, but yield and protection are not guaranteed and underlying yield-source liquidity can affect exits.
